MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Joseph Quinn, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha, CSR Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Alisa J. Kim, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Unifund CCR, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendantRoman Bezverkh.

Damages: $25,729.43
Costs: $200.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,929.43 (See details and break down of judgement amount in scanned doc)
Judgment signed in open court.
